label: Hidden Gem
verdict: Well-maintained and tastefully modified, this 130i is a rare find in the NZ market.
whatMakesSpecial: One of the last naturally aspirated inline-6s BMW put in a hatchback, with a manual gearbox that enhances the driving experience.
whyEnthusiastsCare: The E87 130i is beloved for its hydraulic steering and naturally aspirated inline-6, offering a driving purity that's increasingly rare.

ownerVibe.label: Mature Enthusiast Owner
ownerVibe.reasoning: Extensive maintenance and tasteful mods suggest a knowledgeable owner who cared for the car.

carsCoffee.description: While not a headliner, the 130i's rarity and manual gearbox will draw interest from those in the know.

communityCredibility.description: The 130i has a strong following among BMW enthusiasts for its unique blend of practicality and performance.

socialStanding: The car that makes WRX owners look twice and Honda guys quietly jealous.

specSignificance.note: Highly sought after for driving engagement.
Premium suspension upgrade for improved handling.
Enhances the inline-6's sound and performance.

priceVerdict.reason: The maintenance and modifications justify the asking price in the enthusiast market.

reasons: Manual gearbox adds $3â5k over equivalent auto in NZ
Tasteful mods and documented history increase appeal.

priceOutlook.reason: The 130i's unique attributes maintain its value, but supply is not as limited as older M models.

issues.title: N52 Hydraulic Valve Adjuster Failure
issues.detail: Can cause rough idle and misfires â replacement costs $1,500â2,000 NZD.

issues.title: Water Pump Failure
issues.detail: Electric water pump is a known weak point â costs $800â1,200 NZD to replace.

issues.title: DISA Valve Issues
issues.detail: Failure can lead to power loss â replacement costs $500â800 NZD.

steeringFeel.description: The hydraulic rack provides excellent feedback and precision, making twisty roads a delight.

engineCharacter.description: The N52 inline-6 sings all the way to redline, with a linear power delivery that's a joy to exploit.

dailyComfort.description: Ohlins suspension improves handling but may be firm for daily use; cabin is well-appointed but road noise can intrude.

overallFun.description: The combination of a manual gearbox and a lively inline-6 makes every drive engaging.

drivingCharacter.summary: A driver's car that rewards with every corner and gear change.

reasons: Last naturally aspirated inline-6 in this body

regretRisk.reason: Well-maintained example with desirable spec reduces the risk of buyer's remorse.

marketTrend.reason: Values have plateaued â enthusiast floor is firm but high km and common availability cap any upside.

reasons: N52 engine maintenance can be costly, but a well-maintained example mitigates major risks.
Parts are generally available but can be expensive.

modPotential.powerCeiling: Stage 2 tune and intake mods can push this to 200kW â budget $3,000â5,000 NZD for a reliable street build.
firstMods: N52 catch can ($200â400 NZD) to address oil ingestion before any power mods
Silicone intake hose on the N52 â factory rubber can crack and cause issues.
modPotential.handlingUpgrades: Ohlins coilovers are top-tier, but consider adding a limited-slip differential for better traction.
modPotential.partsEcosystem: Strong support from both local and international suppliers, with a vibrant community on forums like Bimmersport.
modPotential.collectorRisk: Modifications are generally accepted as long as they enhance performance and are reversible.

questionsToAsk: Has the Vanos system been serviced recently?
Any issues with the electric water pump or thermostat?
Are there any signs of oil leaks from the valve cover or oil filter housing?
enthusiastTake: This 130i is a rare gem, combining the best of BMW's driving dynamics with tasteful mods and a manual gearbox.

alternatives.name: Volkswagen Golf GTI Mk6
alternatives.whySuited: Offers a similar blend of practicality and performance with a strong enthusiast following.
alternatives.howDiffers: Turbocharged engine provides a different power delivery and tuning potential.

alternatives.name: Mazda MX-5 NC
alternatives.whySuited: For those prioritizing driving fun and open-top motoring.
alternatives.howDiffers: Lacks the practicality of a hatchback but offers a pure roadster experience.

alternatives.name: Subaru WRX STI (GD)
alternatives.whySuited: For those seeking performance with AWD grip and rally heritage.
alternatives.howDiffers: More raw and aggressive, with a turbocharged flat-four and AWD.
